title: Petface Foodie Faces Fluffy Carrot Dog Toy
features: CUDDLE PLAY: Keep your furry friend entertained with this fluffy Carrot Dog Toy with built-in squeaker
FUN DESIGN: Adorable Petface Foodie Faces design to add charm and colour to playtime activities
FEATURES: Plush and cuddly toy designed for dogs to enjoy their playtime in a delightful manner
SOUND EFFECTS: Built-in squeaker adds excitement and fun during play sessions, stimulating sensory activity for your pet

TOY SAFETY: This toy is strong but not indestructible, and will eventually become susceptible to ‘chew’ damage, please supervise your pet with this toy, examine regularly for wear, and replace if any damage could be seen a health hazard
description: From the manufacturer About Petface Petface - your pets best friend - whether it's collars, leads, feeding accessories, bedding or toys our product experts design with your pet in mind! The Petface range is of the highest quality and provides fun, innovative and interactive products to keep your pets fit, healthy and enjoying life! Petface Foodie Faces Fluffy Carrot Dog Toy The Petface Foodie Faces Fluffy Carrot Dog Toy is a fun, playful companion for your pup. With its soft, plush texture and adorable carrot design, it’s perfect for cuddling, light chewing, and gentle play. The built-in squeaker adds extra excitement, keeping your dog entertained and engaged. Ideal for smaller breeds or gentle chewers, this toy brings a burst of personality and fun to your dog’s toy collection. Soft, Squeaky & Full of Personality The Petface Foodie Faces Fluffy Carrot Dog Toy is bursting with charm. Its plush, carrot-shaped design is soft and cuddly, making it ideal for snuggles and gentle play. A built-in squeaker adds extra fun to keep your dog entertained. Great for smaller breeds and light chewers. Playful Squeaks & Soft Snuggles With its cute carrot shape and friendly expression, this toy is more than just adorable, it’s built for interactive fun. The squeaker engages your pup during play, while the plush texture offers comfort and companionship. A sweet, squeaky treat for your furry friend. A Veggie Your Dog Will Love Bright, cheerful, and irresistibly soft, this Fluffy Carrot is a playful addition to your dog’s toy collection. Crafted from plush fabric with an amusing foodie face, it’s perfect for toss-and-fetch games or comforting nap-time cuddles. Adds a fun twist to everyday play.
